title: canarium perlisanum
intro: Canarium perlisanum, also known as the Canarium tree or Black Caviar tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Malaysia and the Philippines. Its medicinal properties include being used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Canarium perlisanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include oil, extract, and tea, which can be obtained through various methods, such as cold-pressing the seeds or leaves, and steeping them in hot water.
